label: HDRI environment — qwantani_dusk_2 IBL + visible graded bg, panel res fixes, grain aspect fix

operations.before: 1080,1080 — POPX example panel leftover, was the square-view culprit

notes: HDRI: qwantani_dusk_2_puresky_4k.exr (loads at 1280x640 — NC license caps 4K). IBL chain hdri_env -> env_down(512x256) -> env_amb envlightmap, prefilter OFF per promoted footgun. Visible bg: env_down -> bg_hdri_grade(brightness .22) -> bg_fit(fitoutside cover) -> comp_bg input0. bg_base flat constant kept unwired. White-cap discipline: env dimmer 0.6, outhigh 0.88. Nick feedback driving this move: explosion+movement great, colors too dark, wants HDRI physical-space realism.
